allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\), **d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\)]")
